_id.description: Unique MongoDB internal identifier (String UUID or ObjectId)

usuarioId.description: Reference to the User ID (Indexed for fast lookups of user libraries)

movieId.description: Reference to the Movie ID (TMDB ID from the movies collection)

favoritos.description: Flag or category indicating if the movie is in the user's favorites list

vista.description: Status indicating if the movie has been watched (e.g., 'YES', 'NO', 'PENDING')

voto.description: Numerical score given by the user to this specific movie
